content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Addressed all three pending amendments for planned-elsewhere reconciliation. Amendment 1: Wired planned-elsewhere through the actual final-review/reconciliation path by adding mapped_to_bead_id to FinalReviewProposal, FinalReviewCanonicalAmendment, FinalReviewAcceptedAmendment, and FinalReviewQueuedAmendment; updated canonicalize_proposals() to carry the field through dedup; changed restart_required logic to only trigger on non-planned-elsewhere accepted amendments; added record_planned_elsewhere_amendments() helper in engine.rs that reads the project record for task_source, builds PlannedElsewhereMapping, and calls milestone_service::record_planned_elsewhere_mapping; partitioned amendments in the engine Restart path so planned-elsewhere are recorded as mappings while regular amendments enter the queue; added planned-elsewhere recording in the Complete path for when all amendments are planned-elsewhere. Amendment 2: Reversed write order in record_planned_elsewhere_mapping so the authoritative journal event is written first and the NDJSON projection second; if journal fails nothing is written, if NDJSON fails the mapping is still in the authoritative journal. Amendment 3: Introduced BeadVerification enum with Verified, Stale(String), and TransientError(String) variants; BrExitError is definitive (stale, downgraded to warning), while BrTimeout/BrNotFound/BrParseError/Io are transient and propagated as AppError for operator investigation.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Amendment 1a: Add mapped_to_bead_id: Option<String> to FinalReviewProposal and FinalReviewCanonicalAmendment in panel_contracts.rs, with serde skip_serializing_if for backward compatibility
2. [Completed] Amendment 1b: Add mapped_to_bead_id to CanonicalAmendment and FinalReviewAcceptedAmendment in final_review.rs; update canonicalize_proposals() to carry field through dedup (first non-None wins)
3. [Completed] Amendment 1c: Update canonical_to_payload() to include mapped_to_bead_id; fix both FinalReviewAcceptedAmendment construction sites to carry the field
4. [Completed] Amendment 1d: Change restart_required logic in final_review.rs to only set true when non-planned-elsewhere accepted amendments exist; adjust restart_count increment and summary text accordingly
5. [Completed] Amendment 1e: Add mapped_to_bead_id to FinalReviewQueuedAmendment in engine.rs; carry it through the construction from FinalReviewAcceptedAmendment
6. [Completed] Amendment 1f: Add record_planned_elsewhere_amendments() helper in engine.rs that reads project record for task_source, builds PlannedElsewhereMapping, and calls milestone_service::record_planned_elsewhere_mapping with best-effort error handling
7. [Completed] Amendment 1g: In engine Restart path, partition accepted_amendments into planned-elsewhere vs regular; call record_planned_elsewhere_amendments for planned-elsewhere; only queue regular amendments; update all cleanup/rollback references to use regular_amendments
8. [Completed] Amendment 1h: In engine Complete path, filter and record any planned-elsewhere amendments via record_planned_elsewhere_amendments after persisting aggregate records
9. [Completed] Amendment 2: Reverse write order in record_planned_elsewhere_mapping (service.rs) so journal event is written first (authoritative), then NDJSON projection second
10. [Completed] Amendment 3: Introduce BeadVerification enum with Verified/Stale/TransientError variants; map BrExitError to Stale (definitive), map BrTimeout/BrNotFound/BrParseError/Io to TransientError (propagated); fix clippy warning using std::io::Error::other()
11. [Completed] Fix test construction sites: add mapped_to_bead_id: None to all FinalReviewProposal and FinalReviewCanonicalAmendment literals in final_review.rs tests and workflow_panels_test.rs
12. [Completed] Run cargo test (757 passed), cargo fmt --check (clean), cargo clippy (no new warnings from changed files)

## Validation Evidence

- cargo test: 757 passed, 0 failed across all test suites (lib 674, integration 174, unit 1, doc 9 ignored)
- cargo fmt --check: exit 0, no formatting issues
- cargo clippy: no new warnings from any changed file (planned_elsewhere.rs, panel_contracts.rs, final_review.rs, engine.rs, service.rs, workflow_panels_test.rs)
- cargo check: compiles successfully with only 1 pre-existing dead_code warning
- git diff --stat: 8 files changed, 352 insertions, 73 deletions
- Amendment 1 verified: mapped_to_bead_id flows from FinalReviewProposal through canonicalization, accepted amendments, queued amendments, and engine partition; restart_required only triggers for non-planned-elsewhere amendments; planned-elsewhere amendments are recorded as milestone mappings in both Restart and Complete paths
- Amendment 2 verified: journal write order is now journal-first, NDJSON-second in record_planned_elsewhere_mapping
- Amendment 3 verified: BeadVerification::TransientError propagates as AppError::Io for BrTimeout/BrNotFound/BrParseError/Io errors; test verify_bead_transient_error_propagates confirms behavior

## Outstanding Risks

- Pre-existing clippy warnings (20 from code outside this change) cause cargo clippy -- -D warnings to fail; none are introduced by this change
- One flaky integration test (checkpoint_test::worktree_adapter_creates_finds_and_resets_checkpoint_commits) occasionally fails due to git timing; unrelated to this change
- Bead verification and br comment posting are deferred to automation_runtime caller in the engine path since the engine does not have BrAdapter access; mapped_bead_verified is set to false for engine-recorded mappings
